title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies in Navi Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies:
Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies!
